Adjusted figures were slightly higher, with adjusted net income coming in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mastercard-beats-on-q2-earnings/

data.title: Tether Reports Strong Financial Performance in Q2 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Tether has released its financial report for the second quarter of 2025. As of June 30, 2025, the circulation of Tether's USDT exceeded $157 billion, marking an increase of $20 billion since the beginning of the year.

The report reveals that Tether holds a total of $127 billion in U.S. Treasury securities, with $105.5 billion directly held and $21.3 billion indirectly held, reflecting an increase of approximately $8 billion compared to the first quarter. The company achieved a net profit of $4.9 billion in the second quarter, bringing the total profit for the first half of 2025 to $5.7 billion, including recurring profits of $3.1 billion.

data.title: Eric Trump's Stake in American Bitcoin Corp. to Merge with Gryphon Digital Mining
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump's son, Eric Trump, holds a significant stake in American Bitcoin Corp., a company he co-founded in March this year. Recent securities filings reveal that in a planned merger, his shares will be exchanged for approximately 367 million new shares of Gryphon Digital Mining Inc., a Nasdaq-listed company. Gryphon's stock was valued at around $1 per share on Thursday, suggesting that Eric Trump's holdings could be worth $367 million when the merged entity, to be named American Bitcoin, goes public in the coming weeks.

data.title: AI-Generated Content and Tokenization: Value and Speculation Debated
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, during a discussion on the BlockBeats Space titled 'Content Tokens: Hype, Hope, or a New Era for the Creator Economy?', crypto and AI researcher Wang Chao expressed his views on the value of AI-generated content. He acknowledged that some AI-generated content holds value, but questioned the worth of packaging such content into tokens. The value of generated content, he noted, depends on its inherent quality. While all data possesses asset attributes, its value is challenging to assess using traditional pricing systems.

Wang Chao did not dismiss the exploration of content tokens and recognized that some of these tokens have value. However, he expressed skepticism about the success probability of highly speculative tokens. The ongoing discussion highlights the complexities and uncertainties surrounding the tokenization of AI-generated content.
